summary: Testing completed for messaging system and contract e-signature features. Backend APIs 100% passing. Fixed frontend bugs: marketplace providers.map error, sign-contract auth redirection, import path issues. All new features functional.
critical_code_review_comments: sign-contract.tsx had wrong import paths (../../src instead of ../src) - FIXED
marketplace.tsx API response handling - providers.map error when data structure changed - FIXED
_layout.tsx needed exception for public routes like sign-contract - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Created test users: frontend_test_mom@test.com, marketplace_doula@test.com. Created test contract: contract_fc707c609a9b
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging and contract signing features are fully functional. Test credentials: frontend_test_mom@test.com / password123 (MOM), marketplace_doula@test.com / password123 (DOULA). Test contract ID: contract_fc707c609a9b. All backend endpoints tested via pytest. Frontend flows verified via Playwright: login, home, messages tab, marketplace, provider modal, contact provider modal, sign-contract page.

messaging_system.mom_send_message_to_provider: PASS - API tested, UI flow verified
messaging_system.messages_tab_visible: PASS - Verified in MOM bottom navigation

contract_e_signature.view_contract_details: PASS - Public endpoint working, UI loading correctly
contract_e_signature.prevent_re_signing: PASS - API returns 400 for already signed contracts

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Import paths had extra '../' causing Metro bundler to fail
API response structure changed - providers.map error when data is {doulas:[], midwives:[]}
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated fetchProviders to combine doulas and midwives arrays and properly map provider data

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: sign-contract page was redirected to welcome because it's not in auth group
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added isPublicRoute check to allow sign-contract and auth-callback routes without authentication
